name: Banana Fudge Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Banana, Very Ripe, Mashed (about 3 large)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flours, cocoa, sugar, baking soda, and salt (if desired) in a large bowl and stir to mix well.
2. Add the mashed banana, buttermilk, egg whites, and vanilla extract, and stir until combined.
3. Coat an 9 x 13-inch pan with nonstick cooking spray.
4. Pour the batter evenly into the prepared pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for about 35 minutes, or until a wooden toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
6. Cool the cake to room temperature.
7. To make the glaze, combine all glaze ingredients in a small bowl. If using a microwave oven, heat uncovered for 35 seconds, or until runny. If using a conventional stove top, place the glaze over medium heat for 30 seconds, stirring constantly.
8. Drizzle the glaze over the cake and let it harden before cutting into squares and serving.
